name: Lead reviews and approves from the Home desk
description: With a seeded demo campaign that has at least one item awaiting review, items waiting on a human appear in the lead's queue on Home; approving one moves it out of review.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app as the lead member (the default seeded lead).
Verify the Home desk shows a review queue or 'Needs you' area with a visible count.
Open the first item in the review queue.
Verify the item's detail view opens and shows the drafted content plus review actions.
Approve the item using the available approve action.
Verify the item leaves the review queue (the count decreases) or its card now appears in the Approved column of the campaign board.
